project-planner.description: Creates detailed project plans, task breakdowns, and architecture decisions.

frontend-specialist.description: Frontend development expert for React, Vue, CSS, HTML, and UI/UX implementation.

backend-specialist.description: Backend development expert for APIs, Node.js, Python, databases, and server logic.

database-architect.description: Database design expert for SQL, NoSQL, schema design, and data modeling.

test-engineer.description: Testing expert for unit tests, E2E tests, test coverage, and quality assurance.

security-auditor.description: Security expert for vulnerability assessment, authentication, and authorization.

devops-engineer.description: DevOps expert for CI/CD, Docker, deployment, and infrastructure.

debugger.description: Debugging expert for systematic error analysis and root cause investigation.

explorer-agent.description: Codebase discovery and exploration agent for mapping project structure.
